# FileShare Pro

> Secure, fast file sharing with PIN protection, end-to-end encryption, and social share tools. Free tier supports files up to 10GB.

FileShare Pro is a web app for sharing files instantly with anyone — no signup required. Files can be protected by PIN or password, and paid tiers unlock larger file sizes and longer retention.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Upload files and get a shareable link or PIN.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Free, Trial, Pro, and Business plans with file size limits and features.
- [PIN Access](/pin): Enter a 4-digit PIN to open a shared collection.
- [Scan QR](/scan): Scan a QR code to open a shared file on another device.
- [Install](/install): Install FileShare Pro as a PWA.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the FileShare Pro team.
- [Support](/support): Support the project with a donation.
- [Donor Wall](/donors): Public wall of supporters.

## Optional

- [Sign in](/auth): Sign in or create an account to manage uploads.
